title: pluchea indica subsp. indica
intro: Pluchea indica subsp. indica is a subspecies of the Pluchea indica plant, also known as the Indian flea-bane or white top, which is a shrub-like herb belonging to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pluchea indica subsp. indica include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Indian medicine to treat a range of ailments.
